author: u/wiki_watcher
body: This article has been edited over 20 times in the last hour. Something big is happening.

author: u/history_buff
body: The sources being added are clearly biased. Someone is trying to push a narrative here.

author: u/neutral_observer
body: Both sides are making valid points. Let the editors sort it out.

body: This is exactly what Wikipedia is for — real-time documentation of events as they unfold!

author: u/skeptic99
body: Half of these edits are being reverted immediately. Classic edit war.
